text: As I walk through these sterile hallways toward the R+D exhibit, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The environment feels clinical yet purposeful, emphasizing the boundary between the everyday and the realm of ideas at work inside. I feel a gentle excitement—an intellectual alertness—as though I am about to participate in a dialogue between the self and the arc of human innovation. The contrast between isolation in the empty corridor and the colorful, engaging display inside sharpens my awareness of this transition.
